name: YouTube transcript with metadata
prompt: Get the transcript from this YouTube video along with its metadata: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
expected_behavior: Run youtube-transcript script with --info flag to include metadata
Output includes title, channel, duration before transcript
success_criteria: Uses correct flags: --info for metadata inclusion
Outputs both metadata and transcript content
edge_cases: Video with no title/metadata available → output may be incomplete
Age-restricted video → yt-dlp fails, cannot get info or transcript
